summary: Batch 10 was completed by correcting the temporary-license term and replacing six duplicate-angle items with fresh, supportable questions. The completed batch is now suitable to keep with the approved question bank.

corrected_items.resolution: Corrected to 180 days under Texas Insurance Code §4001.155.

corrected_items.issue: Near-duplicate of prior agent address-change timing angle.
corrected_items.resolution: Replaced with monthly notice duty for felony conviction under §4001.252.

corrected_items.issue: Near-duplicate of prior HMO Evidence of Coverage 60-day timing angle.
corrected_items.resolution: Replaced with HMO right-to-change-PCP rule under §843.203.

corrected_items.issue: Near-duplicate of prior Facility of Payment clause angle.
Near-duplicate of prior Notice of Claim timing angle.
corrected_items.resolution: Replaced with Legal Actions provision under §1201.217.
Replaced with prohibited tying by a depository institution under §556.051.

corrected_items.issue: Near-duplicate of prior common-disaster / beneficiary-survival angle.
corrected_items.resolution: Replaced with per capita beneficiary distribution.

B10-Q017 emergency cease and desist authority
